title: ChemSpider Compound
description: A chemical compound record from the RSC ChemSpider database

smiles.description: SMILES representation of the compound structure

commonName.description: Common or IUPAC name of the compound

referenceCount.description: Total number of references in ChemSpider

dataSourceCount.description: Number of external data sources containing this compound

pubmedCount.description: Number of PubMed articles referencing this compound

rscCount.description: Number of RSC publications referencing this compound

mol2D.description: 2D MOL file representation of the compound

mol3D.description: 3D MOL file representation of the compound
